name: Ledger Canonical Reconciliation (LCR) v1
description: Given a small set of transaction ledger CSVs plus FX rate tables, compute exact final per-account balances under a precise set of de-duplication and reversal rules, and emit a canonical JSON answer string.

closest_existing_benchmarks.name: coding / data-wrangling tasks (broadly)
closest_existing_benchmarks.why_not_duplicate: LCR is not a code-writing benchmark; it is a deterministic audit/reconciliation task with intentionally adversarial ledger pathologies (dedupe, reversal semantics, time-indexed FX selection, canonical JSON emission) and a solver-visible rules packet per item.

answer_format.description: A single-line canonical JSON object string mapping account_id -> integer USD cents. Keys must be sorted lexicographically by Unicode codepoint; values are integers. No whitespace.
